channel.title: Confusion Matrix
channel.description: Sports statistics blog by Vik Shirvaikar

item.title: How to Accidentally Make Chess Exciting: The hidden magic of administrative dysfunction
item.description: Explores how chess's Candidates Tournament is affected by chaos in the qualifying process, using Elo rating simulations to map the tradeoff between field balance and win pressure.

item.title: Are National Team Sports a Zero-Sum Game? An early look at the 2038 World Cup
item.description: Explores how national teams compete for elite athletes, using world rankings, GDP, population, and Google Trends data to model performance across five major international team sports.
